name: Marinated Beef Jerky
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef; your choice (if not tender, cut into paper-thin slices)
3 tbsp Soy sauce + 1 teaspoon (can use light soy sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat off the beef.
2. Mix together pepper, onion powder, garlic salt, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Marinate the meat in the mixture overnight.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat it dry between towels.
5. Line a cookie sheet with foil and arrange the meat in a single layer on it.
6. Dry the meat for 8 or more hours at 200°F, turning after 6 hours.
7. Cool and store in a tightly covered jar or sealed plastic bag.
